highlights: Customize projects with icons and emoji for faster visual scanning.
Momentum is now available in English and Spanish across the app.
Use Momentum from Raycast with faster project actions and more reliable manual tracking controls.
Manual tracking flows are easier to start, stop, and manage from Momentum.
fixes: Menu bar controls are more reliable and do a better job surfacing active tracking state.
Project action panels and overlays behave more consistently throughout the app.
Tracking and conflict resolution flows feel more consistent during everyday use.

highlights: The first-launch experience is smoother with a more polished welcome flow.
Menu bar controls now reflect manual tracking status more clearly.
Conflict resolution visuals are easier to scan during review.
fixes: Tracking is more reliable thanks to improved timer guardrails and conflict handling.
Momentum uses less CPU during long-running sessions.
Small UI issues in onboarding and the menu bar were resolved.

highlights: Project domain management is more flexible and easier to maintain.
Settings are easier to navigate with a clearer split-view layout and improved section flows.
fixes: Settings navigation, sizing, and accessibility issues were resolved for a smoother setup flow.

highlights: Projects can now use custom colors for quicker recognition across the app.
Project detail screens now surface clearer summaries and easier navigation through tracked work.
fixes: Project color selection is more stable and closes cleanly after each edit.

highlights: Momentum launched with richer context tracking, project summaries, and cleaner project management workflows.
Settings and project configuration became more practical for day-to-day use.
fixes: The menu bar tracker now initializes more reliably after launch.
